content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

March 10, 2004

Leslie Cook, CMC
City of Santa Cruz
City Clerk’s Department
809 Center Street, Room 9
Santa Cruz, CA 95060

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No.: W-04-039

Dear Ms. Cook:

Pursuant to our conversation of March 5, 2004, this correspondence confirms the withdrawal of your request for advice on a tax measure before the City of Santa Cruz.

Your inquiry presents questions outside the purview of the Political Reform Act ("Act")1 and should be redirected to the Office of the Secretary of State. Under the provisions of regulation 18329(b)(8)(D), copy enclosed, any request not meeting the requirements for formal written advice, must be declined by this agency.

Should you need assistance in the future regarding provisions of the Act, please do not hesitate to submit your request to the Fair Political Practices Commission via facsimile or U.S. Mail.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Lawrence T. Woodlock
Senior Staff Counsel, Legal Division

Enclosure
LTW:jg

1 Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at title 2, sections 18109-18996, of the California Code of Regulations.
